JEP-CRITICAL_FLAW_POWER.title: Critical Flaw
JEP-CRITICAL_FLAW_POWER.description: Next attack deals 0 damage, take double damage. Remove after taking damage or attack.
JEP-CRITICAL_FLAW_POWER.smartDescription: Next attack deals [red]0 damage[/red], take [red]double damage[/red]. Remove after taking damage or attack.
JEP-DARK_BARRIER.title: Dark Barrier
JEP-DARK_BARRIER.description: Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
JEP-DARK_BARRIER.smartDescription: Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
